llmsTxt:
# nr-llm — Shared AI/LLM Foundation for TYPO3

> nr-llm is shared infrastructure for AI in TYPO3 — like the caching framework, but for language models. Administrators configure LLM providers once in a central backend module; every AI-powered extension on the site uses them automatically. It provides a unified provider abstraction (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Ollama, OpenRouter, Mistral, Groq, Azure OpenAI, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint), encrypted API-key storage via nr-vault, and ready-to-use services for chat, translation, vision, and embeddings — with streaming, tool/function calling, response caching, and typed error handling. License GPL-2.0-or-later. Vendor: Netresearch DTT GmbH.

## Key facts

- **Package:** `netresearch/nr-llm` (Composer), extension key `nr_llm`
- **Requires:** PHP 8.2+, TYPO3 v13.4 LTS or v14.3 LTS, a PSR-18 HTTP client
- **License:** GPL-2.0-or-later
- **Repository:** https://github.com/netresearch/t3x-nr-llm
- **Install:** `composer require netresearch/nr-llm`
- **Architecture:** three-tier — Provider (API connections) → Model (per-provider models) → Configuration (use-case presets)

## Landing pages

- [Project home](https://netresearch.github.io/t3x-nr-llm/): Overview of nr-llm, the problem it solves, and who it is for.
- [English landing page](https://netresearch.github.io/t3x-nr-llm/en/): Full English overview for developers, administrators, and agencies.
- [German landing page](https://netresearch.github.io/t3x-nr-llm/de/): Deutschsprachige Übersicht der Extension.

## For developers

- [Developer Guide](https://github.com/netresearch/t3x-nr-llm/blob/main/Documentation/Developer/Index.rst): Full API reference, custom provider registration, typed options, and response objects.
- [Integration Guide](https://github.com/netresearch/t3x-nr-llm/blob/main/Documentation/Developer/IntegrationGuide.rst): Step-by-step tutorial for building a TYPO3 extension on nr-llm.
- Inject `Netresearch\NrLlm\Service\LlmServiceManagerInterface` and call `chat()`, `complete()`, `streamChat()`, or `chatWithTools()`; dedicated services cover translation, vision (alt-text), and embeddings.

## For administrators

- [Admin: Analytics](https://github.com/netresearch/t3x-nr-llm/blob/main/Documentation/Administration/Analytics.rst): Estimated cost and usage trends per provider, model, and service.
- [Admin: User Budgets](https://github.com/netresearch/t3x-nr-llm/blob/main/Documentation/Administration/UserBudgets.rst): Cap per-backend-user spending (requests / tokens / cost, daily / monthly).
- [Admin: Skills](https://github.com/netresearch/t3x-nr-llm/blob/main/Documentation/Administration/Skills.rst): Ingest SHA-pinned SKILL.md instruction files from GitHub and attach them to tasks.
- [Admin: Tools](https://github.com/netresearch/t3x-nr-llm/blob/main/Documentation/Administration/Tools.rst): 41 built-in read-only function-calling tools in 8 toggleable groups, including cited site-content RAG.
- The **Admin Tools > LLM** backend module manages providers, models, configurations, tasks, and a two-minute Setup Wizard that auto-detects the provider from the endpoint URL.

## Architecture decisions

- [Architecture Decision Records](https://netresearch.github.io/t3x-nr-llm/adr/): Index of the project's ADRs documenting design rationale (three-tier provider architecture, vault-based API-key storage, provider fallback chains, per-capability permissions, dashboard widgets, and more).
- [Architecture overview](https://github.com/netresearch/t3x-nr-llm/blob/main/Documentation/Architecture/Index.rst): Design decisions and how the tiers fit together.

## Supported providers

OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Ollama (local, no API key), OpenRouter, Mistral, Groq, Azure OpenAI, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (vLLM, LocalAI, LiteLLM). Switching providers is an admin setting change — no code changes in consuming extensions.

## Security

- API keys are stored as nr-vault UUID identifiers using envelope encryption; nr-llm never stores or logs raw keys.
- The backend module is restricted to administrators.
- Every release ships SLSA Level 3 provenance, Cosign signatures, and SBOMs (SPDX + CycloneDX).
